subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-02 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I am happy wherever I go; this happiness is never separated from me… If the love of Baha'u'llah is present in a heart, it will be endowed with capacity
subcodes.first_line_orig: سُرور قلب من همه جا با من است انفکاک ندارد و دیگر آنکه اسباب سُرور
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @critique of Western values; culture
